final:
module lfsr(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    
    output reg [2:0] q
);

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (reset) begin
        q <= 3'b001;
    end else begin
        q <= {q[1:0], q[2] ^ q[1]};
    end
end

endmodule
